title: Software Engineer III (C++)
description:
FactSet creates flexible, open data and software solutions for over 200,000 investment professionals worldwide, providing instant access to financial data and analytics that investors use to make crucial decisions.
   

  

 At FactSet, our values are the foundation of everything we do. They express how we act and operate, serve as a compass in our decision\\-making, and play a big role in how we treat each other, our clients, and our communities. We believe that the best ideas can come from anyone, anywhere, at any time, and that curiosity is the key to anticipating our clients’ needs and exceeding their expectations.
   

  

**Your Team's Impact**
 At FactSet, Formulas are a primary avenue through which our clients engage with financial content. We are currently seeking a highly skilled Full Stack Engineer to join our Formula Services Team. Our team develops and maintains the infrastructure and applications that power over half a million formulas, relied upon by 80,000 global clients. Your responsibilities include overseeing workflows that involve development, analytics, profiling, and testing of the Formula development workflow.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Architect, implement, and test formula infrastructure using scripting languages like Perl \\& Python.
* Develop and maintain FormulaCentral tools based on .NET Core.
* Engage in all phases of the software development lifecycle.
* Optimize client workflows to maintain high\\-performance systems.
* Integrate with external data sources, particularly RESTful APIs.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to define, design, and deliver new features.
* Adhere to industry best practices while working with innovative technologies, including Large Language Models (LLM) and Data warehousing.
* Stay current with emerging technologies and continuously integrate them into our evolving stack.


**What We're Looking For**
* Minimum of 3 \\- 5 years of experience in software engineering.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent professional experience.
* Strong debugging, problem\\-solving, and analytical skills.
* Intermediate proficiency in scripting languages such as Python and Perl is essential.
* Knowledge of C\\+\\+ is an advantage for understanding the build infrastructure.
* Proficiency in .NET Core web services
* Expertise in RESTful API interactions and the JSON data format.
* Experience with database systems including MSSQL and PostgreSQL.
* Familiarity with at least one front\\-end development framework such as AngularJS (1\\.x) or Vue.js.
* Experience with version control systems, particularly Git.


**What's In It For You**
 At FactSet, our people are our greatest asset, and our culture is our biggest competitive advantage. Being a FactSetter means:
   

  

* The opportunity to join an S\\&P 500 company with over 45 years of sustainable growth powered by the entrepreneurial spirit of a start\\-up.
* Support for your total well\\-being. This includes health, life, and disability insurance, as well as retirement savings plans and a discounted employee stock purchase program, plus paid time off for holidays, family leave, and company\\-wide wellness days.
* Flexible work accommodations. We value work/life harmony and offer our employees a range of accommodations to help them achieve success both at work and in their personal lives.
* A global community dedicated to volunteerism and sustainability, where collaboration is always encouraged, and individuality drives solutions.
* Career progression planning with dedicated time each month for learning and development.
* Business Resource Groups open to all employees that serve as a catalyst for connection, growth, and belonging.


**Learn More About Our Benefits Here.**
 Salary is just one component of our compensation package and is based on several factors including but not limited to education, work experience, and certifications.
   

  

**Returning from break**
 We are here to support you! If you have taken time out of the workforce and are looking to return, we encourage you to apply and chat with our recruiters about our available support to help you relaunch your career.
   

  

**Company Overview**
 FactSet (NYSE:FDS \\| NASDAQ:FDS) helps the financial community to see more, think bigger, and work better. Our digital platform and enterprise solutions deliver financial data, analytics, and open technology to more than 8,200 global clients, including over 200,000 individual users. Clients across the buy\\-side and sell\\-side, as well as wealth managers, private equity firms, and corporations, achieve more every day with our comprehensive and connected content, flexible next\\-generation workflow solutions, and client\\-centric specialized support. As a member of the S\\&P 500, we are committed to sustainable growth and have been recognized among the Best Places to Work in 2023 by Glassdoor as a Glassdoor Employees’ Choice Award winner. Learn more at www.factset.com and follow us on X and LinkedIn.
   

  

 At FactSet, we celebrate difference of thought, experience, and perspective. Qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to characteristics protected by law.

**Why Join Us**

title: Test Development Engineer
description:
An IC Test Development Engineer develops and implements automated test equipment and programs for design verification and production testing of integrated circuits (ICs). This includes designing electronic circuits, writing test software, and ensuring robust and cost\\-effective testing solutions. Develop the test hardware Load board and Probecards for the devices.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Test Program \\& Solution Development: Takes ownership of the entire test solution development process, from initial concept to implementation.
* Creating comprehensive test plans to cover all aspects of the chip's functionality.
* Sound knowledge on
 **Digital, Mixed signal, RF test methodologies** 
 . Experience in developing the test programs in ATE environment for Digital, mixed signal, RF devices.
* Device debug for Digital, Mixed Signal, RF devices using ATE tools and verify with bench Test results.
* Responsible for working with different teams for understanding the device datasheet and come up with a detailed Test procedure/plan to test the chip in ATE environment.
* Strong working experience in
 **Teradyne test systems like ETS (364/88/800\\), UltraFlex, J750, Magnum, Advantest V93K systems** 
 or any other ATE Tester.
* Build ATE hardware design (load board \\& probe card), PCB design tools and Signal Integrity analysis.
* Need to interact with the PCB design team for developing the necessary hardware – Test load board, bench board and probe cards.
* Knowledge on Device Characterization, testing at different temperatures.
* Knowledge on data extraction tool like Perl, Python will be added advantage.
* Performance Optimization: Improves testing processes and methodologies to ensure efficient and cost\\-effective testing.
* Documentation: Creates and maintains test documentation, including test plans, specifications, and procedures.
* Collaboration: Works closely with cross\\-functional teams, including design, manufacturing, and quality assurance, to ensure seamless integration and testing of ICs.
* Test Execution: Running tests on the manufactured silicon, including both pre\\-silicon (emulation) and post\\-silicon platforms.
* Expertise in High Speed Serdes Interface characterization and protocol compliance testing such as PCIe/Ethernet/SDI/CoaXpress/JESD204, MIPI D\\-PHY, MIPI CSI/DSI\\-2, USB and DisplayPort/HDMI etc.



  





  





**Required Skills and Qualifications:** 




  




* Education: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or a related field.
* Candidate should have minimum5 years’ experience in semi\\-conductor testing in ATE.
* Experience in IC test development, with a strong understanding of automated test equipment (ATE) and test software.
* Programming: Proficiency in C/C\\+\\+ programming for test software development.
* Strong knowledge of electronic circuits and measurements.
* Ability to analyze test results, identify issues, and propose solutions.
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to IC testing.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills for collaboration and documentation.
* Ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment.

title: DotNet Compiler Developer
description:
**Introduction**
 Are you interested in compilers and debuggers, operating systems development and Open Source? Your favourites are Linux and low\\-level programming?  Our compilers and toolchain team is responsible for enhancing and maintaining DotNet, GoLang, OpenJDK and Debian compilers, debuggers, libraries, tools, test automation \\&
   

  

 CI/CD). We tightly collaborate with the international development teams of IBM, the global maintainers of Open Source communities, and our Linux distribution partners (Red Hat, SUSE, Canonical).
   

  

 Our focus is on the support of the IBM Z / Linux ONE architecture.
   

  

 Linux on IBM Z / LinuxONE forms the basis of many of IBM's commercial solutions in Cloud, Analytics and AI
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 Develop and maintain compiler features and optimizations.
   

  

* Analyse compiler performance, code size, and other metrics to identify areas for improvement.
* Debug and fix compiler bugs and issues.
* Develop and maintain compiler test suites and benchmarks.
* Building and maintaining toolchains for specific Linux distros.
* Develop and maintain toolchains, including compilers, linkers, assemblers, and debuggers.
* Ensure toolchain compatibility with different hardware and software platforms.


 Integrate toolchains into software development workflows
   

  

**Optimization And Performance**
* Analyse code to identify performance bottlenecks and optimize for speed and efficiency.
* Implement and evaluate compiler optimizations.


**Collaboration And Communication**
* Collaborate with software developers and other teams to ensure efficient software development.
* Communicate technical information clearly and effectively.
* Contribute to open\\-source projects and engage with the wider open\\-source community.


**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
 At least 1\\+ years of experience working with the compilers and debuggers.
   

  

* Knowledge of various Dotnet frameworks and tools.
* Strong understanding of compiler principles, expertise in programming languages like C and C\\+\\+ on Linux, and computer architecture.
* Experience with compiler tools and technologies preferably in DotNet compilers.
* Understanding of LLVM/Clang.
* Knowledge of assembly languages and machine code.
* Familiarity with software development methodologies and tools.
* Source code repository systems (e.g. git), scripting languages (e.g. Python) and test automation skills (e.g. Jenkins)
* Strong debugging and problem\\-solving skills.
* Highly motivated individual to work on Enablement and Development of new features.
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills, go beyond own assets for end\\-to\\-end analysis at eco\\-system.
* Strong written and communication skills with proven fluency in English


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
 Experience “Dotnet compilers and debuggers” on Linux distro.
   

  

* Passionate about learning new tools, languages, philosophies, and workflows.
* Experience with monitoring tools for identifying root cause.
* Prior contributions to Open Source projects or current Open Source maintainer status.
* History of code reviews (e.g. on mailing lists)
* 2 years of experience with toolchain or Dotnet libraries, tools, project around performance.

title: Contact Center Technology Engineer
description:
Our Technology team is the backbone of our company: constantly creating, testing, learning and iterating to better meet the needs of our customers. If you thrive in a fast\\-paced, ideas\\-led environment, you’re in the right place.
   

  

**This role is eligible for our hybrid work model: Two days in\\-office.**
**Why This Job’s a Big Deal**
 This position is responsible for managing a variety of tasks supporting the overall contact center technology ecosystem including phone \\& messaging platforms, IVR, and reporting. This individual must monitor system uptime, conduct periodic testing, investigate technology issues, plan, design, track, and modify IVR\\-enabled telecommunications systems using Amazon Connect or similar technologies.
   

  

**In This Role You Will Get To**

Seek opportunities to secure/harden the contact center infrastructure and improve the proactive monitoring of critical components. Ensure the quality of contact center service in terms of stability, performance, and cost effectiveness.

* Analytics – Analyze metrics on platform/system performance to ensure uptime requirements are met. Continually review and make recommendations to the business on ways technology can be leveraged to improve the customer experience and/or maximize operational efficiency.
* Incident Management \\- Assist with efforts related to service restoration and root cause analysis. Work through outsource partner counterparts to remedy service degradations and develop proper preventive measures as needed to prevent future service failures. Manage day to day technology issues/concerns at our contact centers globally.


**Who You Are**

* Exposure with enterprise\\-scale IVR
* A basic understanding of programming languages and machine learning concepts preferred.

* Illustrated history of living the values necessary to Priceline: Customer, Innovation, Team, Accountability and Trust.
* The Right Results, the Right Way is not just a motto at Priceline; it’s a way of life. Unquestionable integrity and ethics is essential.

* Ability to design, develop, and maintain performance test scripts for web and API.
* Identify and recommend Non\\-Functional Requirements (NFRs) for performance testing through detailed analysis of product specifications and business SLAs.
* Implement comprehensive performance tests including Load, Stress, Endurance and Scalability testing.
* Analyze test results, identify bottlenecks, and collaborate with development teams for tuning and optimization.
* Prepare and present detailed performance reports and dashboard.
* Communicate insights and actionable recommendations effectively to technical and business collaborators.
* Hands\\-on experience with major cloud platforms (AWS and Azure preferred) for leveraging cloud\\-based load generation.
* Ability to correlate performance test results with infrastructure metrics (CPU, memory, disk I/O, network latency) for root cause analysis.

title: Sr. MDM Developer
description:
***Welcome to Warner Bros. Discovery… the stuff dreams are made of.***








**Who We Are…**





 When we say, “the stuff dreams are made of,” we’re not just referring to the world of wizards, dragons and superheroes, or even to the wonders of Planet Earth. Behind WBD’s vast portfolio of iconic content and beloved brands, are the
 *storytellers* 
 bringing our characters to life, the
 *creators* 
 bringing them to your living rooms and the
 *dreamers* 
 creating what’s next…
 









 From brilliant creatives, to technology trailblazers, across the globe, WBD offers career defining opportunities, thoughtfully curated benefits, and the tools to explore and grow into your best selves. Here you are supported, here you are celebrated, here you can thrive.
 




  


**Your New Role
 
 :** 
  
 



 WBD Technology team is seeking a MDM Sr. Developer who will be responsible for providing technical expertise for supporting and enhancing the MDM solutions (Reltio). We are specifically looking for a candidate with solid technical skills and experience in integrating MDM solutions. 
 







 The Sr. Developer will be responsible for designing, implementing, and managing the processes and technologies related to master data within the organization. Master data refers to the foundational data shared across an organization, such as customer data, product data, and more.  
 



 The candidate must have experience in performing MDM (Reltio) tenant configuration, building match and survivorship rules, defining hierarchy and relationships within Reltio and understanding of and configuring the Reference Data Model. The ideal candidate would be an expert in configuring Match and Merge, Survivorship, Delta detection, and Hierarchy Graph using Reltio.  
 







 The candidate's primary job functions include but are not limited to the day\\-to\\-day operations of the MDM platform. The candidate must possess strong communication and analytical skills to effectively work with peers within the Enterprise Technology Group.  
 



  


**Your Role Accountabilities:**
  
 


* Experience using building API's and usage of data loader.


* Proficient in dimensional modelling, data profiling, standardization and cleansing


* Deploy best practices to enhance system performance.


* Skilled in translating business requirements into technology solutions and


* effectively collaborating with business and other technical teams.


* Develop ETL logic and process flows for data cleansing, standardization, and deduplication.


* Experience in implementing Data Quality Management



  


**Data Modeling and Design**
 : Design and implement master data models that align with business requirements and standards. Develop and maintain data dictionaries, ensuring clear definitions and relationships for master data elements. 
 



  


**Data Integration**
 : Integrate master data across different systems and platforms to ensure consistency and accuracy. Collaborate with other developers and teams to streamline data flows and ensure seamless integration processes. 
 



  


**Data Quality Management**
 : Implement data quality rules and validations to identify and correct inconsistencies in master data. Monitor and address data quality issues, collaborating with data stewards and business users as needed. 
 



  


**MDM System Development**

 :
 
 Work with MDM tools and platforms to build and customize solutions for managing master data. Develop and maintain MDM workflows, business rules, and data governance processes. 
 



  


**Qualifications \\& Experiences:**
  
 


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field


* 5\\+ years of experience hands on experience implementing MDM solutions.


* Proven experience in designing and implementing MDM solutions in an enterprise environment.


* Strong knowledge of MDM platforms and technologies (e.g., Reltio MDM, Informatica MDM, SAP Master Data Governance).


* Understanding of data modeling, data integration, data migration, and data quality best practices.


* Familiarity with data governance frameworks and methodologies.


* Experience with developing and executing test plans for MDM solutions.


* Excellent analytical, problem\\-solving, and communication skills.


* Strong team player with ability to collaborate with data architects, analysts, product teams and business users to understand requirements for effective implementation.


* Relevant certifications in MDM or data management are a plus.


* Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast\\-paced environment.



















  


**How We Get Things Done…**









 This last bit is probably the most important! Here at WBD, our guiding principles are the core values by which we operate and are central to how we get things done. You can find them at
 

















 www.wbd.com/guiding\\-principles/
 

















 along with some insights from the team on what they mean and how they show up in their day to day. We hope they resonate with you and look forward to discussing them during your interview.
 








**Championing Inclusion at WBD**



 Warner Bros. Discovery embraces the opportunity to build a workforce that reflects a wide array of perspectives, backgrounds and experiences. Being an equal opportunity employer means that we take seriously our responsibility to consider qualified candidates on the basis of merit, regardless of sex, gender identity, ethnicity, age, sexual orientation, religion or belief, marital status, pregnancy, parenthood, disability or any other category protected by law.
 









 If you’re a qualified candidate with a disability and you require adjustments or accommodations during the job application and/or recruitment process, please visit our
 
 accessibility page
 
 for instructions to submit your request.

title: Associate – Water Supply Network Planning
description:
**Responsibilities**
* Leads the technical delivery of a water supply network planning and modelling. Carries out hydraulic calculations, analysis and investigations for clients using Infoworks WS Pro software for modelling projects and tasks, including preparation of reports, figures and other documents to a high level of grammatical and technical presentation.
* Carries out project works in accordance with our Integrated Management System (IMS). Work alongside project managers and junior team members to ensure efficient delivery. Delivers through teams, not individually.
* Demonstrates industry best practice for model build, calibration and system performance assessments, including leakage and demand analysis, pressure management and infrastructure / growth planning.
* Demonstrates how Infoworks WS Pro models can be used to support the development of zone management plans, water supply strategies and demand management plans.
* Uses Infoworks WS Pro in\\-built tools to successfully investigate complex water network operational scenarios.
* Applies sound engineering judgement to resolve modelling anomalies to improve overall modelling confidence and communicates all risks and limitations on use of hydraulic models to the project team and the client.
* Works without supervision, direct others and ensures their work is verified by an appropriate professional.
* Leads continuous digital improvement and innovation on water hydraulic modelling and can identify and implement opportunities to streamline processes and data management.
* Successfully supports, coaches and mentors hydraulic modelling professionals to achieve a good standard of hydraulic modelling, embedding a culture of successful project delivery whilst also holding them to account, reducing re\\-work and supporting the continuous growth of the WSP water modelling capability.
* Ensures project related quality processes are carried out (technical reviews, verification, approval to release etc.) in a timely and cost\\-effectively manner.
* Undertakes appropriate verification of all inputs and outputs on hydraulic modelling projects including GIS, SCADA, field data and growth projections.
* Provides regular feedback to team members in a constructive and timely manner.
* Completes tasks within allocated timeframes and budgeted hours.
* Ensures all technical risks are understood, managed, assigned to the organisation best placed to manage the risk, and these are well communicated with the project team, and/or client
* Solves problems effectively by applying knowledge of hydraulics and engaging sound problem solving techniques and appropriate analysis to find value engineered/innovative solutions.
* Maintains knowledge of appropriate technical standards, legislation, codes of practice and New Zealand standards; Is knowledgeable on industry developments, trends, and processes.
* Applies sound judgement to decisions about technical issues and solves problems for clients to get the best possible outcome for a project.
* Undertakes appropriate verification of projects and team members’ work.
* Considering risks to client’s business or reputation as part of the planning and management of projects.
* Delivering excellent service to clients to promote repeat and uncompetitive work.
* Develops and maintains an extensive network of industry contacts in India and NZ (as a minimum) and is readily able to access key people.
* Builds and maintains strong, trusted relationships with clients.
* Actively seeks feedback from clients and communicate this to the team to ensure successful delivery of projects and lessons learnt.
* Ensure projects and variations are scoped and priced in a manner that will ensure commercial success and that respond to the specific risk profile of the project.
* Writes and supports bids that are commercially astute, recognises and manages commercial risks while demonstrating value to the client.
* Hold focused meetings that achieve appropriate outcomes at key times; Deliver engaging, informative well\\-organized presentations; Create opportunities to share learnings, improvements, new tools, better practices etc with the wider water team.
* Liaise and work closely with Sector leadership and peer groups across India and New Zealand; Act as a brand ambassador of GCC within WSP in India across geographies.


**Required Skills And Behaviours**
* Fluent in spoken and written English and able to present ideas, complex technical information and advice in a way that is understandable to a wide range of audiences; Communicate difficult/sensitive information tactfully.
* Able to work effectively and competently with people at all levels; within and external to the organisation. Ability to work collaboratively and demonstrated capability to perform effectively as part of a team across a matrix type structure.
* Models WSP Guiding Principles.
* Strong organisational ability to optimise and prioritise conflicting demands in a busy environment, to achieve deadlines and see responsibilities through to completion; copes well under conflicting pressures.
* Commercial and a level of maturity needed to understand business needs and drivers.
* Projects a credible image and inspires confidence; Excellent interpersonal skills.
* Able to manage others and support them through stressful or challenging situations.
* Results orientated, with a reputation for, and demonstrated achievement of, key strategic priorities.
* Active commitment to continuous personal improvement.
* A team player and considers the views of others.
* Ensures that confidentiality is respected and maintained at all times.
* Consistently demonstrates trustworthiness, integrity, professionalism and honesty.
* Natural and confident leader displaying openness, accountability, decisiveness and engagement; Client centric and passionate about service excellence .
* Displays drive, energy and enthusiasm for getting things done with high levels of motivation and energy; Project credibility demonstrate professionalism and inspire confidence with high emotional intelligence and self\\-awareness of strengths and potential areas for development.
* Excellent analytical skills and strong attention to detail.
* Resilient, comfortable with change and ambiguity.


 Software Proficiencies
   

  

* Must be highly proficient in WS Pro software for all water supply network planning applications.
* Highly capable of developing own SQL or other user\\-script applications for Infoworks WS Pro.
* Proficient use of Windows, MS Word/Excel and other Microsoft Office applications.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelors Degree in Civil Engineering followed by a Masters in Water Resource Engineering or Environmental Engineering or similar
* Professional Registration (Chartered Engineer status or equivalent).


**Experience**
* Minimum of 15 years’ experience post qualification in water supply network planning, engineering and hydraulic modelling.
* Must have at least 8 years’ experience using WS Pro software and extensive use within the last 12 months.
* Demonstrable experience in developing SQL or other user\\-script applications for Infoworks WS Pro.
* Past experience in NZ, Australian or UK projects is preferred but not essential.


 BGV:
